cases.title: canary recovery SLO artifact is non-failing
cases.fallback: Run S29-01 and inspect summary + recovery_slo.

cases.title: canary recovery SLO exposes attempts
cases.fallback: Run S29-01 and verify recovery_slo.attempts is emitted.

cases.title: taxonomy pipeline integration remains non-failing
cases.fallback: Run S29-02 and inspect unknown_ratio + collection_actions.

cases.title: taxonomy pipeline record count is emitted
cases.fallback: Run S29-02 and verify pipeline.record_count is emitted.

cases.title: readiness notify multi-channel remains non-failing
cases.fallback: Run S29-03 with --send after configuring channel webhook env.

cases.title: readiness notify records at least two attempted channels
cases.fallback: Run S29-03 with --send and ensure attempted_channels >= 2.

cases.title: triage v4 exports priority actions
cases.fallback: Run S29-04 and verify priority_actions is populated.

Collect at least 1 additional labeled cases for taxonomy 'network'.
Collect at least 1 additional labeled cases for taxonomy 'schema'.

Owner sre-network: collect 1 labeled case(s) for taxonomy 'network'.

cases.title: policy drift guard v4 is non-failing by default
cases.fallback: Run S29-05 with baseline update and inspect drift classification.

cases.title: soak v4 remains actionable

cases.fallback: Run S29-04 and verify exit_conditions is emitted.
actual: Reduce unknown_ratio to <= 0.03 with additional labeled samples.
Configure channel webhooks and verify each channel returns 2xx at least once.
Keep retries enabled and capture failing channel/error in triage.
